features: 【Peel & Stick, 0 Fuss ,Natural Self-Adhesive Lash Clusters: No Glue Needed】Ditch the fussy glue and sticky messes. These natural self-adhesive eyelashes cluster are ready to the pack—just peel, press: instant lash stunning. Suitable for busy mornings, last-minute date nights with press on lash clusters. Even if you’re new to lashes, you’ll nail the look on the first try—no skill required.

【Effortless Glamour: Stick-On Lashes for the On-the-Go Beauty】Our self adhesive eyelash clusters are your ticket to instant lash stunning . In a rush for a last - minute party? Just peel and press these pre-glued individual lashes, and you're ready to slay. No more messy glue pots or waiting for glue to dry—get glamorous lashes in seconds.

【8-16mm Mixed Lengths for Every Look: From Chill to Glam】Our no glued eyelashes cluster come in a versatile 5 lengths (8mm 10mm 12mm 14mm 16mm), allowing you to create a charming lash extensions effect for any occasions.You can even match different styles, the only limit is your imagination!

【Comfort That Lasts: Upgraded Version for All - Day Wear】Made from soft materials, zenotti self adhesive cluster eyelashes feel like a second skin. Our no glue lashes apply mild formula and upgraded self adhesive strips, that provide a long-lasting hold, so you can enjoy comfort from morning to night with our pre-glued lash clusters .

【zenotti Wants to Say】 Thank you for choosing our upgraded self adhesive eyelashes clusters！We are devoted to providing you charming cluster eyelash extensions for desirable quality and prioritize your beauty & comfort all the time. So, if you have any concerns about our no glue lashes stick on, please let us know and we will give you a reply within 24 hours
description: Product description “Discover zenotti's chic self adhesive lashes clusters—crafted for effortless glamour, lasting comfort, and a flawless finish to elevate your eye game!" Why Choose zenotti No Glue Needed Lash Clusters？ With zenotti's self adhesive eyelash cluster , you can easily achieve a flawless look in 1 minutes. Experience the ease and convenience of zenotti's pre-glued lash clusters for yourself! Style：Wispy Self Adhesive Lash Clusters Specification：8-16mm 120pcs Eyelash Clusters Material of eyelashes：Synthetic fiber Advantages：Easy Removal & Mild Formula & Upgraded Adhesive Strips & Strong Hold Directions Peel off lash clusters and stick onto lash line.
